CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to July 17, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Entering Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cohen of Law Office of Robert F. Cohen telephone number 800-492-2657 for Plaintiff American Express Bank.
Defendant Brojan Keane telephone number 650-219-2700 in Propria Persona.

Mr. Cohen requested the motion be taken off calendar stating that the Defendant made a payment. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. Plaintiff American Express Bank's motion for order entering judgment is off calendar.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
